title: Smart Commit: Documentation for shipped artifacts and metrics
original_text: Continued by updating the documentation to match the current ML state. I updated README.md and ml/README.md to document the shipped artifacts: ml/commit_model.pkl, ml/vectorizer.pkl, ml/model_metadata.json; the current 63-example distributed model; the conservative ML confidence gate; per-label evaluator metrics; the new comparison report type/scope/text diagnostics; and Debian apt sklearn validation as current rather than pending. I also added matching progress notes to Roadmap.md. Verification passed: QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v. Result: 61 tests ran, 61 passed. git diff --check passed, and tracked __pycache__ remains clean.
expected_subject: docs(ml): update documentation for shipped artifacts and metrics
expected_body_lines: - Document distributed model files and 63-example training set
- Explain conservative confidence gate and fallback logic
- Add per-label evaluator metrics and comparison diagnostics
- Update Debian sklearn validation status to complete
- Sync Roadmap.md with current ML progress and test coverage
- Validation: all 61 tests pass, git diff --check clean
expected_command: git commit -m "docs(ml): update documentation for shipped artifacts and metrics"
